description: Create a product search page for the store using Drupal Views. The View must be named 'Catalog Search' (machine name: catalog_search) and display 'Products' at the path '/search/catalog'. Ensure the page is accessible to anonymous users and includes exposed filters for both 'Title' and 'SKU'. Add a menu link titled 'Search' to the 'Main navigation' menu. The search results should display the products as rendered entities or a table of fields.
